title: Gratitude To The Unknown Instructors
content:
What they undertook to do
They brought to pass;
All things hang like a drop of dew
Upon a blade of grass.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "Gratitude To The Unknown Instructors"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
